SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is made on the 15th day of October 2023 by and among the following parties:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, Email: emily.tan@fakesg.sg, Phone: +65 6123 4567.

2. Mr. Jonathan Lim, NRIC: https://example.sg/user/S3456789C, residing at 456 Raffles Avenue, Singapore 039393.

3. Tech Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN: T12LL3456A, with its registered address at 789 Anson Road, Singapore 079909.

WHEREAS the parties agree to collaborate on the business operations of Tech Innovations Pte Ltd, with an initial capital investment of SGD 500,000 (the "Investment").

The SHA outlines the terms and conditions governing the rights and obligations of the shareholders. The project plan does not include any change in management structure, and the current project status remains unchanged.

References to the SPA herein are meant to indicate the primary agreement associated with these terms. Further details on the SPA will be provided upon request.
